headline: NAME YOUR QP THE RIGHT WAY
subheading: Eligibility, scope, MHRA variations and governance for your UK or EU manufacturing licence.
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury editorial composition evoking the formal appointment of a Qualified Person to a pharmaceutical manufacturing licence, set against a deep navy backdrop. Centre stage, a pristine fountain pen rests beside an elegant embossed authorisation seal and a softly glowing official certification stamp, symbolising a deliberate, personally accountable signing decision. Translucent teal and cyan layers suggest an open formal document and abstract batch-release data ribbons flowing between a row of out-of-focus glass vials and a sleek tablet. A single fresh-green accent line of light threads through the scene like a verified approval, hinting at independent quality judgement and a trusted quality system. Shallow depth of field, immaculate reflective surfaces, soft directional daylight, premium and considered, sterile yet warm, conceptual metaphor of certification and governance. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
